reasoning: NZDCAD is showing mixed signals. The short-term (1H & 4H) RSIs are near 50, suggesting neither strong overbought nor oversold conditions. Overall, slightly more bearish sentiment than bullish. Thus, the risk assessment favours a SELL position slightly, with HOLD as a viable option considering the mixed signals.
